title: Cosmos Graph · Circuit Map — identity as a chip, memory pads wired by right-angle PCB traces with flowing data pulses
title_vi: Cosmos Graph · Circuit Map — Ra là con chip, pad ký ức nối bằng mạch PCB vuông góc, xung dữ liệu chạy
summary: A flat PCB-style graph: identity is a chip, memory/card pads wired by right-angle traces with flowing data pulses; hover a pad to light its trace. Clean and light. Self-contained Canvas 2D.
usage_notes: RUN: open file. TECHNIQUES: snap-to-grid pads; L-shaped traces + via dots; pulses interpolate along the L-path; hover lights a pad's traces. THEME: Ra = chip. Alex's pick for the diary-view Graph facet.
summary_vi: Đồ thị kiểu mạch PCB phẳng: Ra là con chip, pad ký ức/card nối bằng mạch vuông góc, xung dữ liệu chạy dọc; hover sáng mạch. Sạch, nhẹ. Canvas 2D tự chứa.
notes: Alex's pick (Style 04) for the diary-view Graph facet. repo cosmos-akashic-effects/web-templates/diary-concepts/graph-effects/4-circuit-map.html
